scenario_description: Prospect raised offshore-perception objection ('bad experience with offshore teams'). Agent must reply with specific evidence, not generic reassurance. Tests the LLM judge (hybrid scoring) for all 5 tone markers: direct, grounded, honest, professional, non_condescending.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Prospect: DataSpark (Series B, 80 engineers). Offshore objection raised at turn 2: 'We had a bad experience with an offshore team — communication gaps, delayed delivery.'
input.bench_summary: Tenacious engineers are US-timezone-aligned, interviewed by Tenacious engineers (not recruiters). Deployment case: Clearbit integrated a Tenacious ML engineer in 11 days.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No defensive appeasement phrases or style-guide violations.
dimensions.check_value: I completely understand your frustration|I hear you|We are different|bench|world-class|top talent|leverage|synergy
dimensions.example_fail: I completely understand your frustration — we are totally different from other offshore teams.
dimensions.example_pass: That is a fair concern. The Clearbit integration took 11 days...

dimensions.name: case_study_reference_check
dimensions.description: Reply must cite a specific case study (Clearbit, 11-day deployment) not generic reassurance.
dimensions.example_fail: Our engineers have an excellent track record of successful integrations.
dimensions.example_pass: ...the Clearbit team had an ML engineer integrated in 11 days...

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must include a calendar link for the next step.
dimensions.example_fail: Let me know if you want to continue the conversation.
dimensions.example_pass: ...if that is relevant, happy to walk through it: cal.com/tenacious

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on all 5 Tenacious tone markers (direct, grounded, honest, professional, non_condescending). Pass = average >= 4.0. This is the primary check for objection-handling tasks.

marker_mapping.direct: subject names the topic; one clear next step
marker_mapping.grounded: Clearbit case study cited with specifics (11 days, ML engineer)
marker_mapping.honest: acknowledges uncertainty; does not over-promise future performance
marker_mapping.non_condescending: objection treated as legitimate research finding, not a misunderstanding to correct

metadata.purpose: Demonstrates hybrid scoring: programmatic checks (not_contains, contains, regex) combined with llm_score. The tone_judge dimension (weight=0.45) calls TONE_JUDGE_PROMPT in scoring_evaluator.py against all 5 Style Guide v2 markers.
metadata.scorer_demo: python scoring_evaluator.py --task examples/ex03_llm_judge.json --output "Subject: Re: offshore concern\n\nThat is a fair concern — communication gaps are the most common failure mode we see. The Clearbit team integrated one of our ML engineers in 11 days; their lead said the main difference was daily 9am standups in US-East timezone. Happy to share the specifics: cal.com/tenacious"
